column1: 11pm Update: Tropical Storm Debby now has winds of 45 mph. Notice the track, it really hasn't changed much. Maybe just a touch to the East. The models are in great agreement and we're confident of this track. The big question is just how strong. NHC now has 85 mph before landfall and with all that warm water, it could be stronger. Updates 24/7 and the latest right now on ABC Action News.
Thank you Denis

Denis for President🇺🇸 ! - all kidding aside, thank you for all you do to keep us safe and informed.
And thank you to your family for sacrificing the time they could be spending with you, and lending us Floridians your complete attention during these Hurricane months.🙌🏼🫶🏻
I couldn't agree more, Denis is the best 💙💙
